sglang.author: HanHan009527
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Some models take a long time to download and can be pre-loaded on disk


add DEFAULT_MODEL_CACHE_DIR to decide whether use cache


The download script is coupled to the environment, and the code does not care about the environment information, but only the environment variables. Of course

sglang.title: [Feature]TP Group Switching for PD-Multiplexing
sglang.author: ykcombat
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Individual communication groups for prefill and decode are essential for PD-Multiplexing. Prefill stream and decode stream should use different TP group to avoid NCCL communication conflict. TP group will change with green context stream.
Modifications


Add PD-Multiplexing related serve

sglang.title: [Feature] CUDA Green Context Support
sglang.author: ykcombat
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Add CUDA green context support to sgl-kernel, used for PD-Multiplexing. PD Kernels lauched to two green context streams with different sm counts will execute in spatial multiplexing way.
Modifications


create green context stream with specified sm counts.
get available sm counts of curr

sglang.title: prevent server crash from potential invalid grammar
sglang.author: ehuaa
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
There is not a try catch to deal with ValueError raised from xgrammar accept_token function, it may cause server crash because of xgrammar.
To prevent server crash from further potential invalid grammar, we need to improve the error handling here.
Modifications
Add a try catch operation f

vllm.title: SM100 Cutlass MLA decode with unrestricted num_heads (< 128) for DeepSeek TP
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR ports SGLANG changes to remove num_heads==128 restriction in cutlass mla decode kernel to vllm.
Here are performance results on deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct with a single B200 (this model has < 128 num_heads so could not run before this PR). 65% TPOT improvement for b1 and aro

vllm.title: [BugFix] VLLM_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE=1 should disable all reads and writes from the cache
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
It makes more sense for VLLM_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE=1 to disable all reads and writes from the cache. Today it disables all reads, and some writes. There are edge cases (in PyTorch 2.8) where writing to the cache can fail; that should not block someone from using VLLM_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE=1.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix incorrect dispatch for CutlassBlockScaledGroupedGemm and DeepGEMM
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Change the checks for these kernels to be made explicit as currently DeepGEMM is only supported on SM90 or SM100, and CutlassBlockScaledGroupedGemm is only supported on SM100

Test Result

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Split Entrypoints Test into LLM and API Server
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
I found that the "Entrypoints Test" often takes ~2 hours now and is often flaky due to timeouts in the API server tests. I think we should split up the tests both to run in parallel and to also make retries faster.

vllm.title: [Model] Add AutoWeightsLoader support for BERT, RoBERTa
vllm.author: jennifurhe
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FIX (partial) #15697
Also, fixes a checkpoint loading error by adding requires_grad=False to position_ids. This avoids the following exception when loading weights:
ValueError: Following weights were not initialized from checkpoint: {'bert.embeddings.position_ids'}

Test Plan
BertEmbeddingMo

vllm.title: Implement Async Scheduling
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR implements an initial version of the asynchronous scheduler, similar to the approach described in the NanoFlow paper. The primary goal is to minimize scheduler overhead by overlapping scheduling with model execution. This is achieved by making the scheduler operate one step ahead of the curr
